headline: Retail earnings: What to expect from Kohl's, Dollar General, Dick's
summary: Retailers Kohl's (KSS), Dollar General (DG), and Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS) are set to report earnings this week. Forrester Research Retail Analyst Sucharita Kodali joins Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss the impact of higher gas prices (CL=F, BZ=F) on discretionary spending, trade down to lower-cost retailers, and more. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Dollar General Closure Raises Questions On Store Safety And Investor Risk
summary: A Dollar General Market in Falconer has been temporarily closed due to multiple code violations and safety hazards. Issues cited include roof leaks, potential mold, and falling ceiling tiles that raised concerns for customer and employee safety. The shutdown puts operational practices and store maintenance standards at Dollar General, NYSE:DG, under closer public and regulatory scrutiny. For investors watching Dollar General, NYSE:DG, this local disruption comes alongside a mixed share...
